genre_refs: WWII-style recruitment poster ('Your Country Needs You' / Uncle Sam tradition), comic/illustration style
description: Illustrated recruitment style poster rendered in a vintage WPA and mid-century comic-book style with visible hatching and flat colors. It depicts a muscular young white male worker in a blue chambray or denim work shirt with sleeves, hair combed, looking toward the viewer. Behind him are industrial gantry cranes, shipyard or construction structures, and a cloudy blue sky in muted tones. A small circular Department of Labor seal sits in the lower right corner. Across the bottom in large bold white sans-serif capitals with a drop shadow is the slogan 'YOUR NATION NEEDS YOU!' The tweet reads 'Your nation needs you. Will you answer the call and build America's Future?'
